name: code-hub
short_description: Self-documenting code project management system using Claude AI for automated documentation generation and semantic search.
long_description: Code Hub is a comprehensive project management and documentation system that scans your codebase directory, uses Claude Code in headless mode to automatically generate README.md, METADATA.json, and USAGE.md files for projects, and provides a web interface with full-text and semantic search capabilities. It maintains a SQLite database with FTS5 indexes and ChromaDB vector embeddings for intelligent project discovery and exploration. The system includes a REST API, file browser, code viewer with syntax highlighting, and deep code search capabilities across your entire ~/Code directory.

modules.name: scanner
modules.description: Project discovery and analysis module that scans directories, detects programming languages, extracts git information, and collects project statistics.

modules.name: generator
modules.description: Documentation generation orchestrator that creates README.md, METADATA.json, and USAGE.md files using Claude AI for projects.

modules.name: claude_wrapper
modules.description: Wrapper for Claude Code CLI in headless mode with rate limiting, retries, and timeout management for reliable AI API calls.

modules.name: models
modules.description: Peewee ORM models defining database schema for projects, modules, keywords, dependencies, and full-text search indexes.

modules.name: indexer
modules.description: Full-text and vector indexing system for projects using SQLite FTS5 and ChromaDB for searchable content.

modules.name: vectorstore
modules.description: Vector embeddings and semantic similarity search using ChromaDB and sentence-transformers for intelligent project discovery.

modules.name: server
modules.description: FastAPI web server providing REST API endpoints and HTML web interface for browsing and searching projects.

modules.name: cli
modules.description: Command-line interface with click providing commands for scanning, generating, indexing, searching, and serving.

modules.name: config
modules.description: Pydantic-based configuration management with environment variable support for paths, Claude models, and server settings.

modules.name: scheduler
modules.description: Scheduling system for periodic scanning, generation, and indexing tasks to keep the project database up to date.
